code:
import io
import string

let line = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(line)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
mut in_token = false
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      in_token = false
    else
      if not in_token
        count = count + 1
        in_token = true
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let r = count % 3
let name = match r
when 0
  "Red"
when 1
  "Green"
when _
  "Yellow"
end
println(name)
